name: Fidelity Solana Fund
summary: PART I . Summary Fidelity Solana Fund (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on March 20, 2025, pursuant to the Delaware Statutory Trust Act. The Trust issues common shares of beneficial interest (Shares), which represent fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust. The Shares of the Trust are listed on the NYSE Arca, Inc. (the Exchange). FD Funds Management LLC (the Sponsor) is the sponsor of the Trust, CSC Delaware Trust Company (the Trustee) is th...
